name: Cream Cheese Stuffed Cornish Hens
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak clay pot cooker, top and bottom, in water for about 15 minutes. Drain.
2. Rinse the hens and pat dry. Reserve the giblets for another use. Sprinkle the hens with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Mix the herbs into the cream cheese to taste. Place half of the cheese inside each hen.
4. Place the hens, breast sides up, in the cooker. Drizzle with margarine.
5. Place the cooker in a cold oven. Set the oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake until the hens are tender and lightly brown, about 75 minutes.
6. Remove the cover and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until browned more.
7. Serve with cooking juices over the hens.
